title: eriophyllum lanatum var. lanceolatum
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum var. lanceolatum, commonly known as California fleabane or Oregon sunshine, is a perennial shrubby herb native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is a member of the sunflower family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of California fleabane include reducing inflammation and fever, treating digestive issues and skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and resilience.
